query: brachytherapy pacemaker patient management protocol guidelines

results.title: Safe Delivery of Endoscopic Brachytherapy in a Patient with a Dual Chamber Pacemaker.
results.snippet:
PubMed ID: 31687064. 2019/06/30 00:00. PURPOSE: To retrospectively report pacemaker (PM)/implantable 
cardioverter-defibrillator (ICD) dose in balloon high-dose-rate (HDR) 
brachytherapy and provide distance-dose graph and table to approximately 
estimate the maximal device dose.
METHODS AND MATERIALS: For 3 patients (A, B, and C), PM/ICD was retrospectively 
contoured on planning computed tomography images and its maximal dose was 
extracted from a dose-volume histogram. The surface of 1cm expa
